mapper.select: SELECT A.write_year, A.doc_type, A.doc_no, A.orgn_id, (SELECT ORGN.orgn_nm FROM esg.tb_orgn_info ORGN WHERE A.comp_id = ORGN.comp_id AND A.orgn_id = ORGN.orgn_id) AS orgn_nm, A.created_at, B.doc_seq AS risk_doc_seq, B.risk_orgn, B.risk_desc, B.present_pos, B.present_sev, B.measure_desc AS risk_measure_desc, B.measure_st_dt as risk_measure_st_dt, B.measure_ed_dt as risk_measure_ed_dt, B.measure_pos, B.measure_sev, B.present_level, B.measure_level, B.use_yn AS risk_use_yn FROM esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities_risk_detail B LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities A ON A.write_year = B.write_year AND A.doc_type = B.doc_type AND A.doc_no = B.doc_no WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.doc_type = 'RAO' AND A.doc_no = #{docNo} AND A.write_year = #{writeYear}

SELECT A.write_year, A.doc_type, A.doc_no, A.orgn_id, (SELECT ORGN.orgn_nm FROM esg.tb_orgn_info ORGN WHERE A.comp_id = ORGN.comp_id AND A.orgn_id = ORGN.orgn_id) AS orgn_nm, A.created_at, C.doc_seq AS opp_doc_seq, C.opp_orgn, C.opp_desc, C.opp_concern, C.opp_importance, C.opp_influence, C.opp_level, C.measure_desc AS opp_measure_desc, C.measure_st_dt as opp_measure_st_dt, C.measure_ed_dt as opp_measure_ed_dt, C.measure_result_effect, C.use_yn AS opp_use_yn FROM esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities_opp_detail C LEFT JOIN ESG.tb_risks_and_opportunities A ON A.write_year = C.write_year AND A.doc_type = C.doc_type AND A.doc_no = C.doc_no WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.doc_type = 'RAO' AND A.doc_no = #{docNo} AND A.write_year = #{writeYear}

SELECT A.write_year, A.doc_type, A.doc_no, A.orgn_id, (SELECT ORGN.orgn_nm FROM esg.tb_orgn_info ORGN WHERE A.comp_id = ORGN.comp_id AND A.orgn_id = ORGN.orgn_id) AS orgn_nm, A.created_at, D.doc_seq AS par_doc_seq, D.duties, D.hr_id, (SELECT Z.hr_nm FROM esg.tb_hr_info Z WHERE Z.hr_id = D.hr_id ) AS hr_nm, (select hr_nm from esg.tb_approval_info where target_type = A.doc_type and target_id = A.write_year||A.doc_no and param = 'leader') as leader, D.use_yn AS par_use_yn FROM esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities_par_detail D LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities A ON A.write_year = D.write_year AND A.doc_type = D.doc_type AND A.doc_no = D.doc_no WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.doc_type = 'RAO' AND A.doc_no = #{docNo} AND A.write_year = #{writeYear}

SELECT B.content1, B.content2, B.content3, B.content4, B.detail_type, B.detail_seq FROM esg.tb_risk_and_ops_asmt_criteria A INNER JOIN esg.tb_risk_and_ops_asmt_criteria_detail B ON A.criteria_id = B.criteria_id WHERE A.confirmed_yn = 'Y' AND A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' AND B.use_yn = 'Y' order by B.ord_seq asc
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD(CAST(COALESCE(MAX(CAST(doc_no AS INTEGER)), 0) + 1 AS INTEGER)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS doc_no FROM esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = 'RAO'
INSERT INTO esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities ( comp_id, write_year, doc_type, doc_no, orgn_id, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{writeYear}, 'RAO', #{docNo}, #{orgnId}, #{useYn}, NOW(), #{createdBy} )

INSERT INTO esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities_risk_detail ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, risk_orgn, risk_desc, present_pos, present_sev, measure_desc, measure_st_dt, measure_ed_dt, measure_pos, measure_sev, present_level, measure_level, doc_seq, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, 'RAO', #{docNo}, #{riskOrgn}, #{riskDesc}, #{presentPos}, #{presentSev}, #{riskMeasureDesc}, #{riskMeasureStDt}, #{riskMeasureEdDt}, #{measurePos}, #{measureSev}, #{presentLevel}, #{measureLevel}, (SELECT CAST(COALESCE(MAX(doc_seq)::INTEGER, 0) AS INTEGER) + 1 FROM esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities_risk_detail WHERE doc_type = 'RAO' AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND write_year = #{writeYear} ), #{riskUseYn}, NOW(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities_risk_detail SET risk_orgn = #{riskOrgn}, risk_desc = #{riskDesc}, present_pos = #{presentPos}, present_sev = #{presentSev}, measure_desc = #{riskMeasureDesc}, measure_st_dt = #{riskMeasureStDt}, measure_ed_dt = #{riskMeasureEdDt}, measure_pos = #{measurePos}, measure_sev = #{measureSev}, present_level = #{presentLevel}, measure_level = #{measureLevel}, use_yn = #{riskUseYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND doc_seq = #{riskDocSeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities_opp_detail ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, opp_orgn, opp_desc, opp_concern, opp_importance, opp_influence, measure_desc, measure_st_dt, measure_ed_dt, measure_result_effect, opp_level, doc_seq, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, 'RAO', #{docNo}, #{oppOrgn}, #{oppDesc}, #{oppConcern}, #{oppImportance}, #{oppInfluence}, #{oppMeasureDesc}, #{oppMeasureStDt}, #{oppMeasureEdDt}, #{measureResultEffect}, #{oppLevel}, (SELECT CAST(COALESCE(MAX(doc_seq)::INTEGER, 0) AS INTEGER) + 1 FROM esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities_opp_detail WHERE doc_type = 'RAO' AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND write_year = #{writeYear} ), #{oppUseYn}, NOW(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities_opp_detail SET opp_orgn = #{oppOrgn}, opp_desc = #{oppDesc}, opp_concern = #{oppConcern}, opp_importance = #{oppImportance}, opp_influence = #{oppInfluence}, measure_desc = #{oppMeasureDesc}, measure_st_dt = #{oppMeasureStDt}, measure_ed_dt = #{oppMeasureEdDt}, measure_result_effect = #{measureResultEffect}, opp_level = #{oppLevel}, use_yn = #{oppUseYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND doc_seq = #{oppDocSeq}
mapper.insert:
SELECT CAST(COALESCE(MAX(doc_seq)::INTEGER, 0) AS INTEGER) + 1 as par_doc_seq FROM esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities_par_detail WHERE doc_type = 'RAO' AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND write_year = #{writeYear}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities_par_detail ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, duties, hr_id, doc_seq, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, 'RAO', #{docNo}, #{duties}, #{hrId}, #{parDocSeq}, #{parUseYn}, NOW(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.delete: UPDATE esg.tb_task_manager_detail SET use_yn = 'N' WHERE req_info_key like #{reqInfoKey}||'%'
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT Z.minor_nm FROM esg.tb_common_d Z WHERE Z.major_cd = 'C0034' AND Z.minor_cd = A.risk_orgn ) AS risk_orgn, A.risk_desc, A.present_pos, A.present_sev, A.measure_desc AS risk_measure_desc, CASE WHEN A.measure_st_dt = '' THEN '' else A.measure_st_dt END AS risk_measure_st_dt, CASE WHEN A.measure_ed_dt = '' THEN '' else A.measure_ed_dt END AS risk_measure_ed_dt, A.measure_pos, A.measure_sev, A.present_level, A.measure_level FROM esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities_risk_detail A WHERE A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.doc_type = 'RAO' AND A.doc_no = #{docNo} AND A.doc_seq = #{riskDocSeq}

SELECT (SELECT Z.minor_nm FROM esg.tb_common_d Z WHERE Z.major_cd = 'C0034' AND Z.minor_cd = A.opp_orgn ) AS opp_orgn, A.opp_desc, A.opp_concern, A.opp_importance, A.opp_influence, A.opp_level, A.measure_desc AS opp_measure_desc, CASE WHEN A.measure_st_dt = '' THEN '' else A.measure_st_dt END AS opp_measure_st_dt, CASE WHEN A.measure_ed_dt = '' THEN '' else A.measure_ed_dt END AS opp_measure_ed_dt, A.measure_result_effect FROM esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities_opp_detail A WHERE A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.doc_type = 'RAO' AND A.doc_no = #{docNo} AND A.doc_seq = #{oppDocSeq}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.doc_seq) AS no, A.duties, (SELECT Z.hr_nm FROM esg.tb_hr_info Z WHERE Z.hr_id = A.hr_id ) AS hr_nm, (SELECT X.signature FROM esg.tb_approval_info X WHERE X.hr_id = A.hr_id and X.param = 'company' and X.target_id = A.write_year || A.doc_no || '_' || A.doc_seq ) AS signature FROM esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities_par_detail A WHERE A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.doc_type = 'RAO' AND A.doc_no = #{docNo} AND A.doc_seq = #{parDocSeq}

SELECT (SELECT Z.minor_nm FROM esg.tb_common_d Z WHERE Z.major_cd = 'C0034' AND Z.minor_cd = A.risk_orgn ) AS risk_orgn, A.risk_desc, A.present_pos, A.present_sev, A.measure_desc AS risk_measure_desc, CASE WHEN A.measure_st_dt = '' THEN '' else A.measure_st_dt END AS risk_measure_st_dt, CASE WHEN A.measure_ed_dt = '' THEN '' else A.measure_ed_dt END AS risk_measure_ed_dt, A.measure_pos, A.measure_sev, A.present_level, A.measure_level FROM esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities_risk_detail A WHERE A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.doc_type = 'RAO' AND A.doc_no = #{docNo} AND A.use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT (SELECT Z.minor_nm FROM esg.tb_common_d Z WHERE Z.major_cd = 'C0034' AND Z.minor_cd = A.opp_orgn ) AS opp_orgn, A.opp_desc, A.opp_concern, A.opp_importance, A.opp_influence, A.opp_level, A.measure_desc AS opp_measure_desc, CASE WHEN A.measure_st_dt = '' THEN '' else A.measure_st_dt END AS opp_measure_st_dt, CASE WHEN A.measure_ed_dt = '' THEN '' else A.measure_ed_dt END AS opp_measure_ed_dt, A.measure_result_effect FROM esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities_opp_detail A WHERE A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.doc_type = 'RAO' AND A.doc_no = #{docNo} AND A.use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.doc_seq) AS no, A.duties, (SELECT Z.hr_nm FROM esg.tb_hr_info Z WHERE Z.hr_id = A.hr_id ) AS hr_nm, (SELECT X.signature FROM esg.tb_approval_info X WHERE X.hr_id = A.hr_id and X.type = 'company' and X.target_id = A.write_year || A.doc_no || A.doc_seq ) AS signature FROM esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities_par_detail A WHERE A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.doc_type = 'RAO' AND A.doc_no = #{docNo} AND A.use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT A.comp_id, A.write_year, A.doc_type, A.doc_no, A.orgn_id, (SELECT ORGN.orgn_nm FROM esg.tb_orgn_info ORGN WHERE A.comp_id = ORGN.comp_id AND A.orgn_id = ORGN.orgn_id) AS orgn_nm, A.use_yn FROM esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities A WHERE A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.orgn_id = #{searchText} ORDER BY A.WRITE_YEAR DESC
